profiles.description: ArkTS-to-C++ JSI runtime binding infrastructure. Changes may affect ArkTS component mounting, lifecycle, or property binding across all components.

limitations: exact SDK API cannot be inferred
profiles.notes: Do not emit exact SDK API. Bounded smoke only.

profiles.description: Select/Menu/Popup overlay infrastructure. Changes affect Select, Menu, Popup overlay interaction and positioning.
profiles.risk_surface: select overlay / menu / popup interaction infrastructure
limitations: exact coverage equivalence required for must_run — not emitted here
profiles.notes: Select/Menu/Popup domain first, bounded overlay smoke as fallback.
